content: React Router v7 for GitHub Pages static hosting: use createHashRouter (data router API) instead of the legacy <HashRouter> component. This gives access to loaders, actions, and lazy routes while producing /#/path URLs. createHashRouter takes a routes array and optional DOMRouterOpts. The basename option is not needed when using hash routing since the hash prefix substitutes for path-based base. Wrap app in <RouterProvider router={router} />.
